BCB_3CG_1.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 792
Recv ID: 793
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 67
Func Name: BCB

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AAY",
    "soft": "1151",
    "version": "1000"
  }
]
